span.t-attf-class: o_priority_star d-inline-block fa fa-star#{' text-warning' if task.priority != '0' else '-o opacity-75'} #{classes if classes else ''}
o_priority_star d-inline-block fa fa-star#{' text-warning' if task.priority in ['2', '3'] else '-o opacity-75'} #{classes if classes else ''}
o_priority_star d-inline-block fa fa-star#{' text-warning' if task.priority == '3' else '-o opacity-75'} #{classes if classes else ''}
